heading: JSON (JavaScript Object Notation)
body:
The `JSON` global module provides [JSON methods](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/JSON) to serialize and
deserialize standard JavaScript objects.

| Method           | Description                                              |
| ---------------- | -------------------------------------------------------- |
| JSON.parse()     | Parse a serialized JSON string into a JavaScript object. |
| JSON.stringify() | Serialize a JavaScript object into a JSON string.        |
